description.en: TIN is a ten digit identifier assigned to individuals and entities for tax purposes in Ethiopia. It is a permanent identification number and never changes.

access.onlineAccessDetails:
The list is maintained by the Ethiopian Ministry of Revenue: https://www.mor.gov.et/

An identifier lookup portal can be found here: https://www.mor.gov.et/qr/
access.guidanceOnLocatingIds: Enter the TIN to confirm the associated organisation. Lookup by known TIN, not searchable by name or browsable.

data.dataAccessDetails: Research suggests that TIN can only be verified, not found from company names. No data download function is available.
data.licenseDetails: Copyright © Ministry of Revenues, Ethiopia. All rights reserved.

meta.source: Desk research based on MOR and ERCA official websites, TADAT assessment report, and third-party tax compliance sources (TaxDo, 2merkato).
